allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('./data.json'\); console.log\('TOP KEYS:', Object.keys\(d\)\); console.log\('teams count:', Object.keys\(d.teams||{}\).length\); console.log\('sample team:', JSON.stringify\(Object.entries\(d.teams||{}\)[0]\)\); console.log\('years:', \(d.years||[]\).slice\(0,50\)\); console.log\('combos count:', \(d.combos||[]\).length\); console.log\('sample combos:', JSON.stringify\(\(d.combos||[]\).slice\(0,5\)\)\); const sk=Object.keys\(d.squads||{}\); console.log\('squads count:', sk.length\); console.log\('sample squad key:', sk[0], 'len', d.squads[sk[0]].length\); console.log\('sample player:', JSON.stringify\(d.squads[sk[0]][0]\)\);")
